resources.string: Please connect to an available WIFI
GPS function is required to operate nearby Bluetooth devices. Please turn on the location service to continue.
Bluetooth function is required to operate nearby Bluetooth devices. Please turn on Bluetooth to continue.
Bluetooth permissions are required to operate nearby Bluetooth devices. Please grant them before continuing.
Location permission is required to operate nearby Bluetooth devices. Please grant it before continuing.
Adding files requires storage permissions, please grant them before continuing.
Device must be forced to upgrade
